tools.name: query_portfolio
tools.description: Execute natural language queries over portfolio data in Snowflake. Translates natural language to SQL, applies tenant/RBAC filtering, and returns structured results with generated SQL for transparency.

query.description: Natural language question about portfolio (e.g., 'Show me properties in TX with occupancy > 90%' or 'What is our total NOI by property type?')

persona_role.description: User's role for access control: advisor (full access), analyst (query + reports), executive (high-level summaries), readonly (view only)

user_id.description: User identifier for rate limiting (60 req/min per user) and audit logging

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Semantic search across property corpus using vector embeddings. Finds relevant documents (leases, valuations, CAP statements, surveys, etc.) with relevance ranking. Supports optional property and document type filtering.

query.description: Natural language search query (e.g., 'lease renewal terms for major tenants' or 'property valuations from 2024')

property_id.description: Optional: filter to documents from specific property

top_k.description: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 50)

tools.name: get_property_scorecard
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive performance metrics for a specific property including occupancy, financial KPIs, lease schedule, tenant quality, and risk indicators. Optional 24-month historical trends.

include_historical.description: Include 24-month historical trends and YoY comparisons

tools.name: get_portfolio_summary
tools.description: Retrieve aggregate portfolio-level KPIs: total NOI, portfolio occupancy, weighted average cap rate, tenant concentration, lease expiration schedule, and geographic distribution.

as_of_date.description: Report date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

tools.name: list_properties
tools.description: List all properties in portfolio with optional filters by state, property type, or occupancy threshold. Returns basic property info and key metrics for easy browsing.

min_occupancy_pct.description: Optional: filter to properties with at least this occupancy percentage
